title: Constitutional Convention
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Constitutional Convention''' was an event mandated by the [[Corellian Treaty]]. According to the Treaty, the Convention—deciding the form of the restored [[New Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]—was mandated to occur once [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] resigned, was deposed, or [[Death/Legends|died]].

==History==
The Convention was convened by the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to debate the creation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It lasted for months with all delegates getting a chance to speak, but nothing was decided. In the end the convention established a provisional government under the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] to establish a permanent constitution and government.
